summary: Frontend testing of GenStudio credit-gated async job pipeline. All GenStudio pages working correctly with wallet integration, dynamic pricing, job pipeline, and history filters.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Text→Video duration dropdown credit calculation (JS operator precedence bug)
All GenStudio pages properly display wallet balance with available/reserved credits
Dynamic pricing works correctly: TEXT_TO_VIDEO (25 + 5/sec), IMAGE_TO_VIDEO (20 + 4/sec)
History page filters work for type and status filtering
Job pipeline uses walletAPI for HOLD/CAPTURE/RELEASE pattern
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user with 100 credits
context_for_next_testing_agent: GenStudio wallet integration complete. All pages use walletAPI for wallet display and job operations. History page supports filtering by job type and status.

GENSTUDIO_DASHBOARD.details: Wallet display (100 available), AI tools with credit costs, History link, active jobs polling

TEXT_TO_IMAGE_PAGE.details: Wallet display, prompt input, templates, aspect ratio, consent checkbox, generate button shows 10 credits

TEXT_TO_VIDEO_PAGE.details: Wallet display, dynamic pricing based on duration (45/65/85 credits), estimated cost box with formula breakdown

IMAGE_TO_VIDEO_PAGE.details: Wallet display, image upload area, motion description, duration selector, estimated cost (36 credits for 4s)

HISTORY_PAGE.details: Wallet display, type filter (6 options), status filter (4 options), download buttons, security notice

WALLET_API.details: GET /api/wallet/me returns balance/reserved/available, GET /api/wallet/pricing returns all 7 job types

JOB_PIPELINE.details: Jobs list shows SUCCEEDED/CANCELLED status, ledger shows HOLD/CAPTURE/RELEASE entries

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Duration dropdown showed incorrect credit values due to JS operator precedence
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added parentheses to ensure correct calculation: (baseCredits || 25) + duration * (perSecondCredits || 5)
